load_failed_error: Failed to load catalogue source data for the work editor.
load_requested_work_failed: Failed to load the requested work.
missing_work_param: Search for a work by work id.
new_status_loaded: Creating a draft work source record.
new_runtime_state: Public site update is unavailable until the draft exists.
new_summary_next: Create the draft, then continue editing or publish from edit mode.
create_status_validation_error: Fix validation errors before creating the draft work.
create_result_success: Created draft work {work_id}. Opening edit mode...
save_status_saving_and_updating: Saving source record and updating parent work output…
save_status_conflict: Source record changed since this page loaded. Reload the work before saving again.
save_result_success_applied: Saved source changes and updated the public catalogue at {saved_at}.
save_result_success_partial: Source changes were saved at {saved_at}, but the public update failed.
save_result_unchanged: Source already matches the current form values.
bulk_save_result_success_applied: Saved {count} work records and updated public catalogue output for published records at {saved_at}.
bulk_save_result_success_partial: Saved {count} work records at {saved_at}, but the public update failed.
build_preview_template: Public update preview: work {work_ids}; series {series_ids}; catalogue search {search_rebuild}.
build_preview_unpublished: Public update unavailable while the work is not published.
build_result_success: Public catalogue updated at {completed_at}. Studio Activity updated.
bulk_build_preview: Public update preview: {count} published work scope(s) will be updated.
publication_status_invalid: Publication is available only for draft or published works.
publication_status_validation_error: Fix validation errors before changing publication state.
unpublish_confirm_dirty_note: Unsaved form changes will be discarded.
publication_status_public_failed: Publication state changed, but the public update failed.
publication_result_public_failed: Source status changed, but public artifacts did not finish updating.
publication_result_published: Work is published and public catalogue output has been updated.
publication_result_unpublished: Work is draft again and public catalogue output has been cleaned up.
publication_status_conflict: Source record changed since this page loaded. Reload before changing publication state.
prose_import_preview_invalid: Staged prose is not ready to import.
prose_import_confirm_overwrite: Overwrite existing prose source at {target_path} with staged file {staging_path}?
prose_import_result_success: Prose imported to {target_path} at {completed_at}. The next site update will publish it.
delete_status_conflict: Source record changed since this page loaded. Reload before deleting again.
field_invalid_year: Use a whole year or leave blank.
field_invalid_number: Use a number or leave blank.
details_new_unavailable_draft: Publish this work before adding work details.
details_search_no_match: No matching detail ids for this work.
details_empty: No work details for this work.
summary_rebuild_needed: public update failed in this session
